column1: # Phase 4 — `{BRANCH loc}`. The macro program counter jumps to the
# named or addressed location and continues from there.
#   A3: 'never                       (line 3: would dirty A3 if reached)
# Stash the branch target at D7.
# Define the names \M (over A1) and \J (over D7).
# Fire \M. Expected: B5 has 'one (line 1), B6 has 'two (\J target
# after the BRANCH), A3 still has 'never (line 3 was never reached).
